title: Apollo Hospitals is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Apollo Hospitals is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
We at Apollo Hospitals are looking for an experienced Consultant Physician based out of Kochi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Apollo Hospitals:
Apollo Hospitals is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Hospitals!
